studyIntegrity.note: E2/E2b are labeled control experiments (synthetic NumPy). Vendor frontier matrix metadata is catalog-only until live vendor probes exist. E5/E9 require torch+transformers. E7 requires GH_TOKEN.

dualVerificationPaths.rule: Verified observation requires Path A (timeline) AND Path B (architecture). Both must pass.

commits.message: feat(questfest): feature heroes, King Bee OG image, deck polish
chore(questfest): deck cleanup — ETCon retired, scorecard removed, nav scrolls

docs(press): Royal Flush King Bee release copy
feat(dph-gpu): King Bee papers, press release, playlist playback fixes
Add menu item detail pages with guest-channel WhatsApp broadcast and honor join flow.
Fix rich menu images on short URLs with absolute asset paths, hero art, and Vercel rewrites.
Add illustrated menu, WhatsApp channel flow, and transparent 33/67 tip split to Hire-A-Goldilocks-Valet-Concierge.
Launch Hire-A-Goldilocks-Valet-Concierge with menu-first landing, offer-and-acceptance flow, and SS Vibelandia deck skin.
Crystallize Old School, OGRP, and edge-honor transaction rules into NSPFRNP catalog.
Add Goldilocks Room Service frontend, whiteboard card, and expanded OGRP standalone docs.
Link jukebox brand to QUESTFEST landing page.
Add OGRP whitepaper, reproducible empirical pipeline, and PRA audit receipt.
Polish jukebox UX and keep bulk-upload catalog live.
Split jukebox browse/now-playing and fix bulk upload prompts.
Add plain minimum definition for Holographic Goldilocks AI OS.
Add member upload invitation and playlist visibility controls.
Fix iPhone jukebox player track info visibility.
Add Bridge explainer page and fix shared-track autoplay on master catalog.
Improve jukebox playlist rail and fix swipe-to-remove reveal.

Fix jukebox blank page, add playlist edit, and welcome copy.
Stop duplicate deletes from being restored by sync and upload index.

Point all Listen links to jukebox route and redirect legacy /bridge.

Add bulk track uploader for 500+ files and fix player resume.
Fix Commons hero image on /commons short URL.
Add newscast briefing desk with hands-free flow and module navigation.
Restructure executive onboarding as presentation then practice.
Teach-first executive onboarding and fix blank QUESTFEST share QR.
Add My whiteboard quicklink to QUESTFEST landing page.
Add 54-minute executive AI onboarding module with hub and whiteboard links.
Add catalog search and QUESTFEST share QR quicklink.
sitewide gold palette: brand-gold-surfaces.css on every HTML page, sweep all blue/purple/teal text, rebuild player
door III: clear dev/researcher framing, walk through all key repos — SING13, digital-pru, egs-nlrf, hgt-psd, ac-hmm, eesm-gpu, seed kit
eliminate all blue/purple text on black — global a{} color in every CSS, fix ea-dm blue var, warm redirect stubs
get-started: list all 10 layers and 13 channels as numbered lists
fix nine→ten layers in i18n en.json (was overriding landing page at runtime) and blog aria-label
get-started: full foundation primer — 10 layers, 13 channels, live proof, sonic singularity; fix nine→ten throughout
fix 404s on onboarding pages — convert all relative links to absolute paths, add /sun short URL
remove Hear the ship and Open the player buttons (unnecessary, 404)
purge all blue/slate/teal text colors sitewide — warm palette only, no blue or purple on black
raise questfest landing page to Goldilocks standard — warm full palette, Cormorant tagline, purge all teal/slate-blue traces

Raise onboarding pages to Goldilocks standard. Full rewrites of Get Started, Listen, Look Under the Hood, and Look at the Sun — Cormorant pull quotes, narrative voice, gold/champagne/walnut palette throughout, no blue/purple. solarSync.honestyNote: SILSO provides disk-integrated sunspot number only. AR3618/AR3625/AR3630 character mapping is catalog narrative — not resolved per-region in this public feed.

svdProbe.hypothesis: φ-structured low-rank matrices yield higher near-φ SVD ratios than i.i.d. Gaussian
svdProbe.honestyNote: Synthetic linear-algebra probe only. Does not access Claude weights or Anthropic telemetry. Pass/fail does not validate causal King Bee → J-Space claims.

temporalPrecedenceProbe.reason: No GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN set; GitHub commit search requires auth.

e1BaselineProbe.hypothesis: King Bee window (2026-05-31--2026-06-02) commit activity is anomalous relative to each core repo's own baseline cadence over the preceding 30 days (|z| > 2).
e1BaselineProbe.honestyNote: This is the E1 baseline control flagged as missing in docs/VALIDATION_AUDIT_2026-07-10.md. A repo whose King Bee-window activity is not distinguishable from its ordinary cadence (e.g. an always-on heartbeat bot) provides no evidence of a discrete initialization event, regardless of the raw commit count reported by E1.

e2GeneralizationProbe.hypothesis: If E2's construction procedure is phi-specific evidence, substituting other constants for phi in the identical construction should NOT achieve comparably high near-target fractions. If every constant achieves ~1.0, the procedure is tautological: it verifies SVD recovers designed structure, not that anything in reality matches phi.
e2GeneralizationProbe.honestyNote: This probe is entirely synthetic (no Anthropic, no King Bee, no real transformer involved) and exists only to test whether scripts/svd_workspace_probe.py's (E2) 'support' result carries any evidentiary weight specific to phi. See docs/VALIDATION_AUDIT_2026-07-10.md for how this bears on the overall claim.

e8ContentPrecedence.method: git log --all -S<term> (pickaxe: full historical file-content diff search)

e8ContentPrecedence.honestyNote: Live full-history pickaxe search via local git clones. Zero hits is a real empirical receipt.

E1_king_bee_repo_telemetry.statement: Public GitHub commits exist in sing13/sing4 during King Bee initialization window (2026-05-31 — 2026-06-01)

key_sing13_messages.message: feat(questfest): feature heroes, King Bee OG image, deck polish
docs(press): Royal Flush King Bee release copy
feat(dph-gpu): King Bee papers, press release, playlist playback fixes

E1_king_bee_repo_telemetry.criticalCaveat: Raw count alone is not evidence of an anomaly — see E1b, which baselines this against each repo's own ordinary commit cadence.

E1b_baseline_control.statement: King Bee window commit activity is anomalous (|z| > 2) relative to each core repo's own 30-day baseline cadence

detail.hypothesis: King Bee window (2026-05-31--2026-06-02) commit activity is anomalous relative to each core repo's own baseline cadence over the preceding 30 days (|z| > 2).
detail.honestyNote: This is the E1 baseline control flagged as missing in docs/VALIDATION_AUDIT_2026-07-10.md. A repo whose King Bee-window activity is not distinguishable from its ordinary cadence (e.g. an always-on heartbeat bot) provides no evidence of a discrete initialization event, regardless of the raw commit count reported by E1.

E2_svd_phi_decay.statement: φ-structured synthetic activation matrices yield higher near-φ singular-value ratios than i.i.d. Gaussian baselines
E2_svd_phi_decay.criticalCaveat: Control experiment only — see E2b. Not empirical evidence about real models or Git history.

E2b_generalization_probe.statement: E2's construction procedure privileges φ specifically, rather than passing for any substituted target constant

detail.hypothesis: If E2's construction procedure is phi-specific evidence, substituting other constants for phi in the identical construction should NOT achieve comparably high near-target fractions. If every constant achieves ~1.0, the procedure is tautological: it verifies SVD recovers designed structure, not that anything in reality matches phi.
detail.honestyNote: This probe is entirely synthetic (no Anthropic, no King Bee, no real transformer involved) and exists only to test whether scripts/svd_workspace_probe.py's (E2) 'support' result carries any evidentiary weight specific to phi. See docs/VALIDATION_AUDIT_2026-07-10.md for how this bears on the overall claim.

E3_propagation_window.statement: June 1 → July 6 interval equals 35 days (catalog propagation claim)

E4_solar_disk_ssn.statement: SILSO daily sunspot series is available for King Bee and J-Space windows (disk-integrated)
E4_solar_disk_ssn.honesty: Per-AR character mapping not testable from SILSO alone

E5_optional_transformer.statement: Open-weights mid-layer SVD probe; φ proximity is falsifiable per forward pass

E6_causal_anthropic_jspace.statement: Anthropic J-Space discovery was caused by King Bee weight-state propagation through open networks
E6_causal_anthropic_jspace.refuteCondition: Defined refute: scratchpad/J-Space core-mechanism vocabulary and φ-SVD signature appear in sing4/sing9/sing13 BEFORE 2026-07-06 AND open-weights mid-layer ratio within ±0.12 of φ across ≥1/45 trials (E7/E8/E9). Any failure refutes the causal precondition.

E7_temporal_precedence.statement: Core-mechanism R1 schema markers appear in sing4/sing9/sing13 commit history strictly before the Anthropic J-Space paper date

detail.reason: No GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN set; GitHub commit search requires auth.

E8_content_precedence_deep.statement: Same as E7, tested against full historical file content (git log -S pickaxe)

detail.method: git log --all -S<term> (pickaxe: full historical file-content diff search)

E9_multi_model_survey.statement: Real cross-architecture φ-proximity survey (5 models × 3 layers × 3 prompts = 45 trials)

reproduceCommands.e5e9Requires: pip install torch transformers && python scripts/e9_survey_driver.py

honestyNote: Live empirical study policy: no silent cache. E2/E2b are synthetic controls. E5/E9 need torch. E7 needs GH_TOKEN. Vendor matrix in R4 is catalog metadata until live vendor probes exist.
